rationale_source: R11-C M1 + M2: cross-doc postal discrepancy triggers F4.PC callout injection in admin Risk Factors; Snapshot Property Address row is street-address-only (postal stripped)

postal_code_tuples.rationale: F1.PC captures both with distinct source-tier classifications (loan_app vs appraisal).

subject_property_address.rationale: F1.AD; address consistent, only postal varies.

postal_code_discrepancy_detected.rationale: F4.PC triggered by >1 distinct postal value across doc-tier sources.

must_include.rationale: F4.PC callout enumerates distinct postal values with source labels (R11-C M2).
F1.AD street address in Snapshot row.

must_not_include.rationale: ASSERTION-2 R11-C M1: Snapshot Property Address row must NOT contain inline postal suffix (street-address-only after R11-C M1 strip).
